title: Binary Tree Representation: Array vs Linked
description: A visual comparison of how a binary tree can be represented using an array (for a complete binary tree) and a linked structure using nodes with left and right pointers.
relationships: Parent-Child links shown with pointers/arrows (for linked representation)
Calculation of child/parent indices within an array (e.g., left child: 2i+1, right child: 2i+2)
